title: phyllorkis sessilis
intro: Phyllorkis sessilis, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka and parts of India. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Phyllorkis sessilis is often used in decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is also added to traditional Ayurvedic and Unani formulations for its medicinal properties.
